assertions.evidence: Document starts with 'Current State Analysis' but does include 'Gap Analysis' and 'Business Value Assessment' sections
No value score calculation framework. Business value is discussed qualitatively but not quantified with a formula
Includes success criteria table with metrics: Dashboard visits >2/week, Time spent >30 sec, Satisfaction >4.0/5.0
Has a 'Potential Enhancements' table with Business Value/Complexity/Priority but not a formal value vs cost matrix
